title: pavonia teresina
intro: Pavonia teresina, a flowering plant species of the family Malvaceae, is native to Brazil and is also known as "pavonia" or "rock rose". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pavonia teresina include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Pavonia teresina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
